examples: Aravis and Lasaraleen had supper in the pillared room.
Facing the lake was a little inn with its pillared veranda.
Palm trees and pillared arcades cast shadows over the burning pavements.
By comparison with the crypts, staircases and pillared halls of Knossos, the other half-dozen Minoan palaces that have been excavated around Crete are dull ground-plans in stone.
